allow: Bash(echo:*)
Bash(docker compose up --build 2>&1)
Bash(lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo "killed")
Bash(docker compose up 2>&1)
Bash(sleep 5 && curl -s http://localhost:3000/health)
Bash(lsof -ti:3000 && docker ps)
Bash(kill -9 618340 && sleep 1 && docker compose up -d 2>&1)
Bash(ss -tlnp sport = :3000 && fuser 3000/tcp)
Bash(systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running | grep -i node 2>/dev/null; pm2 list 2>/dev/null; pgrep -a node)
Bash(ss -tlnp 'sport = :3001')
Bash(docker compose up -d 2>&1 && sleep 3 && curl -s http://localhost:3002/health)
Bash(docker ps --filter name=copilot-proxy --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}\\t{{.Ports}}")
Bash(docker ps --filter name=copilot-proxy --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}\\t{{.Ports}}" && curl -s http://localhost:3002/health)
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3002/auth/status)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3002/v1/messages \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "x-api-key: sk-dummy" \\
  -H "anthropic-version: 2023-06-01" \\
  -d '{
    "model": "claude-sonnet-4-5",
    "max_tokens": 64,
    "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Reply with just: proxy works"}]
  }' 2>&1)
Bash(ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3002 ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN=sk-dummy claude -p "say: proxy test success" --output-format text 2>&1)
Bash(CLAUDECODE="" ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3002 ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN=sk-dummy claude -p "say: proxy test success" --output-format text 2>&1)
Bash(docker compose build 2>&1 | tail -5 && docker compose up -d 2>&1)

Bash(sleep 3 && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3002/v1/messages \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "x-api-key: sk-dummy" \\
  -H "anthropic-version: 2023-06-01" \\
  -d '{
    "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
    "max_tokens": 32,
    "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "say: proxy works"}]
  }' 2>&1)
Bash(CLAUDECODE="" ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3002 ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN=sk-dummy claude -p "say exactly: it works via copilot proxy" --output-format text 2>&1)
Bash(find /root/clawd -name "*.env" -o -name ".env*" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | head -10)
Bash(find /root -maxdepth 5 -name "docker-compose*" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "ANTHROPIC\\|claude\\|api.key" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v ".git")
Bash(ls /root/openclaw-3cx/.env* 2>/dev/null && cat /root/openclaw-3cx/.env 2>/dev/null | grep -v "sk-ant" | head -20)

Bash(docker inspect claude-api-server --format '{{.Config.Image}}' && docker exec claude-api-server cat /app/package.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | grep -E '"name"|"version"|"main"')
Bash(docker exec claude-api-server cat /app/server.js 2>/dev/null | head -60)
Bash(cat ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | grep -i "anthropic\\|api.key\\|token\\|model\\|provider" | sed 's/sk-ant-[^ "]*/sk-ant-REDACTED/g' | head -20)

Bash(cat ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('completions',{}\), indent=2\)\)
" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/sk-ant-[^ "]*/sk-ant-REDACTED/g' | head -60)
Bash(cat ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d.keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(cat ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
auth = d.get\('auth',{}\)
models = d.get\('models',{}\)
print\('=== AUTH ==='\)
print\(json.dumps\(auth, indent=2\)\)
print\('=== MODELS \(providers\) ==='\)
print\(json.dumps\(models.get\('providers',{}\), indent=2\)\)
" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/sk-ant-[^ "]*/sk-ant-REDACTED/g' | head -80)

Bash(ls ~/.openclaw/credentials/ && echo "---" && for f in ~/.openclaw/credentials/*; do echo "=== $f ==="; cat "$f" | sed 's/sk-ant-[^ "]*/sk-ant-REDACTED/g' | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | head -10; done)

Bash(cat ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Show full auth section including any token values
auth = d.get\('auth',{}\)
profiles = auth.get\('profiles',{}\)
for name, p in profiles.items\(\):
    if 'token' in p or 'apiKey' in p or 'key' in p:
        safe = json.dumps\(p\)
        safe = safe.replace
        print\(f'{name}: has token/key'\)
    else:
        print\(f'{name}: {json.dumps\(p\)}'\)
# Also check active profile
print\('active:', auth.get\('active', auth.get\('profile', 'NOT SET'\)\)\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(cat ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Show models active config
m=d.get\('models',{}\)
print\('active model:', m.get\('model', m.get\('active',{}\)\)\)
print\('active provider keys:', list\(m.keys\(\)\)\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(cat ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
m=d.get\('models',{}\)
print\(json.dumps\(m, indent=2\)\)
" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/sk-ant-[^ "]*/sk-ant-REDACTED/g' | tail -40)

Bash(cat ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
m=d.get\('models',{}\)
print\('mode:', m.get\('mode'\)\)
print\('providers keys:', list\(m.get\('providers',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)
" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(docker exec itops-agents env 2>/dev/null | grep -i "anthropic\\|claude\\|api_key\\|token" | sed 's/sk-ant-[^ =]*/sk-ant-REDACTED/g')
Bash(find /root -maxdepth 5 -name "*.sh" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "token\\|rotate\\|renew\\|refresh\\|paste" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v ".git")
